evidence: Cost calculation in src/shared/domain/cost.ts verified via unit tests (12 tests, green).

INVESTIGATION_MAX_COST_USD env var added to config (default 0 = no ceiling).
cost_exceeded status added to IncidentStatus type, Postgres entity schema, and status transition map (valid from investigating).
Cost ceiling check implemented in all 4 investigation modes: wave-based (lines 1152-1160), orchestrator (lines 1720-1728), hypothesis (lines 417-425), debate (lines 469-477).

GET /v1/investigation/:id and GET /api/v1/investigation/:id return cost_exceeded incident status mapped to 'failed' display status via runStatusFromIncident(). Verified at real HTTP boundary by setting an incident to cost_exceeded in Postgres and confirming the API response shows status=failed and incident.status=cost_exceeded.
API started and healthy on PORT=5177 with OSS runtime (Postgres + Redis + BullMQ).
pnpm test:run: all 12 cost-tracking tests pass.
pnpm typecheck: only pre-existing test-file errors (0 new errors related to AC-038).
